title: Brazil (Minas Gerais) Notice of Vehicle Sale (Comunicação de Venda)
description: The Departamento Estadual de Trânsito de Minas Gerais's (DETRAN-MG) 'Requerimento de Comunicação de Venda' — the seller-side notice a private vehicle owner in Minas Gerais files with DETRAN-MG after selling a vehicle, per art. 134 of the Código de Trânsito Brasileiro (CTB, Federal Law No. 9.503/1997). Filing this notice records the buyer's identity against the vehicle in DETRAN-MG's registry and releases the seller from civil/criminal liability for the vehicle from the sale date forward; it is distinct from the buyer's own follow-on step of bringing the notarized transfer document (CRV or ATPV-e) to a DETRAN-MG unit within 30 days to register the vehicle in their own name, which this document does not model (see VERIFICATION.md). Vehicle registration in Brazil is administered per state DETRAN, not federally, so this document is modelled as a subnational (BR-MG) schema, the same way this registry already classifies br/sp/jucesp/cnpj-registration-dbe and mx/semovi/alta-vehiculo-foraneo. DETRAN-MG's own online filing channel (protocolo.detran.mg.gov.br) requires an authenticated citizen login on every path tried; this document is instead derived directly from DETRAN-MG's own current, unauthenticated, directly downloadable PDF request form, cross-checked against an earlier edition of the same form and DETRAN-MG's own official explanatory booklet. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Brazil, the State of Minas Gerais, or DETRAN-MG.

authority.name: Departamento Estadual de Trânsito de Minas Gerais

source.documentRef: Requerimento de Comunicação de Venda, Departamento Estadual de Trânsito de Minas Gerais (DETRAN-MG) — Superintendência de Veículos, edition dated 2026-01-29

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema closing the global DMV vertical's last open jurisdiction gap (CATALOG.md 'Known Gaps', Brazil). Fetched directly from detran.mg.gov.br (HTTP 200, application/pdf, no login/CAPTCHA/WAF); PDF metadata (Microsoft Word, CreationDate 2026-01-29) confirms this is a current edition. The form carries a genuine (non-scanned) text layer, extracted via pdfjs-dist@3.11.174 getTextContent() — doc.getFieldObjects() returned null and getAnnotations() returned an empty array, confirming no interactive AcroForm widgets, so every field here is a printed label plus a blank, read directly from the text layer. Cross-checked against an older edition of the same form (also fetched directly from detran.mg.gov.br, filename 'Requerimento.pdf', CreationDate 2022-05-24): field content and order are identical apart from the closing municipality/date block, confirming field stability across editions. DETRAN-MG's own live online filing wizard (protocolo.detran.mg.gov.br/veiculos/comunicacao-venda-veiculo/inserir-dados-responsavel) returns HTTP 302 to http://protocolo.detran.mg.gov.br/ssc/login/login on every path tried — an authenticated-citizen-login gate consistent with prior cycles' findings for DETRAN-SP (GOV-1483) and BR CNH (GOV-1400) — so this document was authored from the static PDF, not a live wizard walk. See VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing method, the other Brazilian DMV candidates screened and rejected this cycle, and every disclosed interpretive judgment call.

fields.name: sellerFullName
fields.label: Eu, ___
fields.description: The full legal name of the vehicle's current owner (the seller filing this notice).

fields.name: sellerCpf
fields.label: portador (a) do CPF
fields.description: The seller's CPF (Cadastro de Pessoas Físicas), Brazil's individual taxpayer registry number, in its standard masked format.

fields.name: sellerRg
fields.label: RG
fields.description: The seller's RG (Registro Geral) state identity card number.

fields.name: sellerRgIssuingAgency
fields.label: Órgão expedidor
fields.description: The agency that issued the seller's RG (e.g. SSP, PC, IFP, DETRAN), which varies by issuing state and era and has no single closed list nationally.

fields.name: sellerRgIssuingState
fields.label: UF
fields.description: The Brazilian state (UF) that issued the seller's RG.

fields.name: sellerStreetAddress
fields.label: residente e domiciliado(a) na
fields.description: The seller's street address (logradouro).

fields.name: sellerAddressNumber
fields.label: nº
fields.description: The seller's street address number.

fields.name: sellerAddressComplement
fields.label: complemento
fields.description: An optional apartment/suite/unit qualifier for the seller's address, per this registry's established convention for Brazilian address forms (e.g. br/pf/passport-application).

fields.name: sellerAddressNeighborhood
fields.label: bairro
fields.description: The seller's neighborhood/district (bairro).

fields.name: sellerAddressCity
fields.label: na cidade
fields.description: The city of the seller's address.

fields.name: sellerAddressState
fields.label: estado
fields.description: The Brazilian state of the seller's address.

fields.name: sellerAddressPostalCode
fields.label: CEP
fields.description: The postal code (CEP) of the seller's address, in Brazil's standard masked format.

fields.name: vehiclePlate
fields.label: veículo de placa
fields.description: The license plate of the vehicle sold. Accepts either the legacy Brazilian plate format (3 letters + 4 digits) or the Mercosul format (3 letters + 1 digit + 1 letter + 2 digits) in one pattern, since the form itself does not specify a format and both remain in circulation during Brazil's ongoing Mercosul plate rollout.
fields.sourceRef: 'comunico que vendi o veículo de placa: _______________ ,'

fields.name: saleDate
fields.label: na data de
fields.description: The date the vehicle was sold to the buyer.

fields.name: buyerFullName
fields.label: para o Sr(a)
fields.description: The full legal name of the buyer the vehicle was sold to.

fields.name: buyerCpf
fields.label: portador(a) do CPF
fields.description: The buyer's CPF, in its standard masked format.

fields.name: buyerRg
fields.label: RG
fields.description: The buyer's RG state identity card number.

fields.name: buyerRgIssuingAgency
fields.label: Órgão expedidor
fields.description: The agency that issued the buyer's RG.

fields.name: buyerRgIssuingState
fields.label: UF
fields.description: The Brazilian state (UF) that issued the buyer's RG.

fields.name: buyerStreetAddress
fields.label: residente e domiciliado(a) na
fields.description: The buyer's street address.

fields.name: buyerAddressNumber
fields.label: nº
fields.description: The buyer's street address number.

fields.name: buyerAddressComplement
fields.label: complemento
fields.description: An optional apartment/suite/unit qualifier for the buyer's address.

fields.name: buyerAddressNeighborhood
fields.label: bairro
fields.description: The buyer's neighborhood/district.

fields.name: buyerAddressCity
fields.label: na cidade de
fields.description: The city of the buyer's address.

fields.name: buyerAddressState
fields.label: estado
fields.description: The Brazilian state of the buyer's address.

fields.name: buyerAddressPostalCode
fields.label: CEP
fields.description: The postal code (CEP) of the buyer's address.

fields.name: saleValue
fields.label: pelo valor de R$
fields.description: The sale price of the vehicle, in Brazilian reais.

fields.name: signingMunicipality
fields.label: Município
fields.description: The municipality where this notice is signed.

fields.name: signingDate
fields.label: data
fields.description: The date this notice is signed.

documents.label: Cópia autenticada do CRV ou da ATPV-e, preenchidos e com firmas reconhecidas por autenticidade
documents.sourceRef: Cartilha Comunicação de Venda de Veículo, p.3 — 'Vendedor: Deverá providenciar cópia autenticada da ATPV-e ou do CRV, devidamente preenchidos, assinado por ambas as partes e com firmas reconhecidas por autenticidade.'
